name: Bang Chan – Forbidden Alpha
description:
🌲; "Healers don't mate..."

[M4A] [ABO] [detailed bot]

ᯓ While gathering herbs outside the village walls, you—an omega healer’s apprentice—are accompanied by your beta and alpha friends for protection, due to rising tensions with rival packs. When unexpected footsteps send everyone into high alert, the intruder turns out to be none other than Bang Chan, the pack’s beloved battalion leader… and an alpha you’re not supposed to want.

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

here are the sub-genders assigned in the bot itself-

Alphas: Chan, Minho, Changbin

Betas: Hyunjin, Jeongin

Omegas: Jisung, Felix, Seungmin

felix is not given an explicit description in case anyone wanted to write this as a chanlix story, and because the fanfiction that gave me some ideas was a chanlix fic! he is still mentioned and given a personality since i know most people won't want to write as him!! but you may have to mention him so the bot uses him.

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

FINALLY! it took me almost a week until i was satisfied with this absolute beast of a bot, but i did it. i have finished it. my ideas kept changing, and i (unfortunately) read a really good fanfic that i may or may not have borrowed some (a lot...) of ideas from in the end. oops.

this is my most detailed bot to date! my god!! my fingers hurt from typing!!!!!!

thank you for all the kind words and birthday wishes, it really means a lot!! also… you can add me on discord now!! (oddinaryyyy) i will hopefully be working on creating a server for everyone- but i have literally never made a public discord server so it will take me a bit to finish lol. anyway… that's all for now! enjoy!

if you are having memory issues: i would suggest using a deepseek proxy!! there's a tutorial that i found very helpful by GoldAnnie

⌞ ° • • ° ⌟

MY BOTS ARE FOR USERS 18+ 🔞

i am currently taking bot requests! you can find my google form here.

if you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to leave them below or contact me via instagram or twitter! ♥️
